description: Five CREATED orders in zone-surge-e2e, each with ETA +30min (at-risk threshold is 25min). Combined with RAIN weather (injected separately), demandFactor=1.0 and weatherFactor=1.2 yields surgeMultiplier=1.6, exceeding the 1.15 threshold. With window.size.seconds=10 the timer fires within 10s.

expectedResult.description: One SURGE_PRICING signal for zone-surge-e2e. demandFactor=1.0 × weatherFactor=1.2 × demandWeight=0.5 → surgeMultiplier=1.6.
